title: Segmentation fault assigning global parameters to each other
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Run `yosys test.v` on or around f44b287f

```verilog
parameter A = 0;
parameter B = A;
```

## Expected behavior

Should not crash.

## Actual behavior

```
 /----------------------------------------------------------------------------\

 |  yosys -- Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite                                       |

 |                                                                            |
 \----------------------------------------------------------------------------/

 Yosys 0.9+2406 (git sha1 f44b287f, gcc 9.3.0-10 -fPIC -Os)


-- Parsing `test.v' using frontend `verilog' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: test.v
Parsing Verilog input from `test.v' to AST representation.
zsh: segmentation fault  yosys test.v
```

Backtrace:
```cxx
0x0000555555769697 in Yosys::AST::AstNode::simplify(bool, bool, bool, int, int, bool, bool) ()
(gdb) bt
#0  0x0000555555769697 in Yosys::AST::AstNode::simplify(bool, bool, bool, int, int, bool, bool) ()

#3  0x000055555575b20a in Yosys::VerilogFrontend::execute(std::istream*&, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::vector<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::allocator<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > > >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) ()
#4  0x00005555556a0775 in Yosys::Frontend::execute(std::vector<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::allocator<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > > >, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) ()
#5  0x00005555556a0f7d in Yosys::Frontend::frontend_call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::istream*, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::vector<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::allocator<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > > >) ()
#6  0x00005555556a1093 in Yosys::Frontend::frontend_call(Yosys::RTLIL::Design*, std::istream*, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >) ()
#7  0x00005555556ee122 in Yosys::run_frontend(std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >*, std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >*, Yosys::RTLIL::Design*) ()
#8  0x00005555556854b0 in main ()
```
